assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'PDB violations (most common cause)' and '90% of stuck upgrades' are due to PDB issues

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl get pdb -A -o wide' command to check PDBs across all namespaces

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes multiple commands: checking pending/terminating pods, EvictionBlocked events, and bare pods that won't reschedule

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Includes commands to check for pending pods due to FailedScheduling and provides fix for resource constraints including reducing maxSurge

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl patch command to adjust PDB maxUnavailable and alternative manual editing approach

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: States 'GKE respects PDBs for up to 1 hour, then force-evicts' but doesn't specifically mention GKE sending notifications about PDB blocks

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Provides gcloud command to adjust maxSurge and maxUnavailable upgrade settings as Fix 3 for resource constraints

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Under 'If Still Stuck' section, mentions checking admission webhooks that might be rejecting pod recreation

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Provides 'Monitor Progress After Fix' section with watch commands to track node upgrades and check for remaining stuck pods

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE disruption-event notifications (POD_PDB_VIOLATION) that alert when eviction is blocked by PDB, available via Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
assertions.reason: While it mentions PDB timeout behavior, it doesn't specifically mention POD_PDB_VIOLATION notifications or Cloud Logging/Pub/Sub integration
